news.title: Arm And Marvell Tumble As Chip Stocks Sell Off
news.summary: Chip stocks sold off on Monday despite an upbeat report from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing. Arm and other stocks broke support.

news.title: Stocks to Watch: SK Hynix, SpaceX, Intel
news.summary: ↘️ SK Hynix (KR:000660, SKHY): The chipmaker’s Korean shares sank more than 15%, its biggest one-day drop on record, after its ADRs’ Nasdaq debut on Friday. Its U.S.-listed shares also slumped. Rival Samsung Electronics (KR: 005930) tumbled 9.

news.title: U.S. Stocks Fall as AI Selloff, Oil Jump Rattle Markets
news.summary: U.S. stocks fell as a sharp selloff in chip stocks rattled investor confidence in the artificial-intelligence trade.

news.title: Is MaxLinear Stock a Buy Now or a Hold at Current Levels?
news.summary: MXL's operating momentum is improving, but a 411.7% year-to-date surge and premium valuation leave less room for execution missteps.

news.title: MaxLinear Stock Outlook Hinges on Optics, Broadband and AI Demand
news.summary: MXL's optics ramp and AI-linked demand strengthen its growth outlook, but uneven broadband trends and cash-flow pressure keep execution in focus.

news.title: Tech View: Record Profits, Insider buying, & Cheap Valuations
news.summary: Backed by historic corporate profits, insider buying, and bargain valuations, tech stocks are proving that the 2026 rally is built on rock-solid fundamentals, not hot air.

news.title: Why investors dashed for AI bottlenecks during Q2
news.summary: Data from investment platform eToro showed that investors sought out memory chip makers and energy providers last quarter.

news.title: Wall Street Analysts Look Bullish on Marvell (MRVL): Should You Buy?
news.summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Marvell (MRVL) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

news.title: What Investors Keep Asking About NVDA
news.summary: After a historic run, the critical questions for NVIDIA are no longer about this quarter's numbers but where the next layers of growth will come from and if the company can actually execute on its breathtakingly complex roadmap.

news.title: Broadcom and Marvell Are Bigger Threats to Nvidia Than You Know
news.summary: Nvidia still dominates AI training, but a quiet shift in how hyperscalers spend their next trillion dollars is opening a lane for two chip designers most investors have barely considered.
